# Tool Discovery Test - Verify MCP Tool Registration and Listing
# Demonstrates: tool discovery, capability negotiation, server initialization

# Initialize the server with proper MCP handshake
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true}},"clientInfo":{"name":"TestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}

# Verify initialization response
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":1'
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":'

# List available tools
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}

# Verify tools list response
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"tools":'

# Verify tool properties
stdout '"name":'
stdout '"description":'

# Verify array format
stdout '\['

# Verify no error occurred
! stdout '"error":'

# Request specific tool information
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}
stdout '"tools":'
